news_items.headline: Orioles place Bassitt on IL with back discomfort
news_items.summary: - The Baltimore Orioles placed right-hander Chris Bassitt on the 15-day injured list retroactive to Friday with low back discomfort and recalled Trey Gibson from Triple-A Norfolk to take Bassitt's place in the rotation Monday night against the Seattle...

news_items.headline: 'Terrible' Bregman shoulders blame for Cubs' woes
news_items.summary: Chicago third baseman Alex Bregman, in the first year of a five-year, $175 million contract, put the blame for his team's offensive woes on himself after going 0-for-5 and making the last out in the Cubs' 2-1 home loss to the Giants on Sunday night.

news_items.headline: Chisholm borrows Judge's bat, hits 3-run HR in win...
news_items.summary: Jazz Chisholm Jr. found a way to keep Aaron Judge's bat in the Yankees' lineup. After lumbering through the early innings, Chisholm borrowed lumber from the injured captain, with his three-run homer capping a five-run eighth inning Sunday at Boston.

news_items.headline: Kepler, still serving PED ban, signs with D-backs
news_items.summary: The Diamondbacks on Sunday signed OF Max Kepler, who is still serving an 80-game suspension for testing positive for a performance-enhancing drug.

news_items.headline: Cubs' Taillon exits in 2nd with hamstring strain
news_items.summary: Cubs starter Jameson Taillon will be placed on the injured list after exiting Sunday's game against the Giants with a left hamstring strain in the top of the second inning.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Skubal goes 5 scoreless in 1st rehab start...
news_items.summary: Tigers ace Tarik Skubal pitched five scoreless innings in his first minor league rehabilitation appearance since undergoing elbow surgery last month.

news_items.headline: Royals SS Witt leaves game with knee soreness
news_items.summary: Kansas City shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. left the Royals' game against the Twins on Sunday with what the team described as right knee soreness.

news_items.headline: Mason Miller is so good -- even AI can't replicate...
news_items.summary: Not even MLB's most advanced technology can replicate the dominant San Diego Padres closer.

news_items.headline: The Viva El Birdos Podcast – Episode 68: Nootbaar’s Return
news_items.summary: Yes, I know, it was supposed to be a “reader mailbag” episode. news_items.headline: College Baseball Transfer Portal Rankings: Top 25 overall players
news_items.summary: The NCAA Transfer Portal opened on June 1 for college baseball and will close on June 30. Through the first week or so of the portal, there’s already plenty of talent. Below you’ll find the top 25 overall players who have entered their name so far, as of June 8. While the portal is open, […]
